title: Optional parameters should be passed to base calls
description: Optional parameters should be passed to "base" callsAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearreliabilityBugWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoWhen optional parameter values are not passed to base method calls, the value passed in by the caller is ignored. This can cause the function to behave differently than expected, leading to errors and making the code difficult to debug.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CI©2025SonarSource Sàrl. All rights reserved.Privacy Policy|Cookie Policy|Terms of Use
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Method contains base call - verify optional parameters are properly passed

logic.detection_conditions: Uses regex to detect base method calls in method declarations
logic.triggering_conditions: Method declarations that contain base.Method() calls
logic.exclusion_conditions: Excludes test methods and logging contexts
logic.reasoning: Detects methods that make base calls. This serves as a reminder to check that all parameters (especially optional ones) are properly passed to base method calls to avoid unexpected behavior.

should_trigger: public override void Method(string name, int value = 42) { base.Method(name); }
should_not_trigger: public void Method(string name) { /* no base call */ }
